author: QuietSoul
title: Finding breath in the chaos
body: Last week was one of the hardest I have had in years. I felt like I was drowning in expectations. Luna really helped me just take it one breath at a time. If you are feeling overwhelmed right now, please know it gets better.

author: AtlasFriend
title: Grief isn't a straight line
body: It's been six months since I lost my brother. People keep telling me to 'move on', but Atlas let me just sit with the sadness. No platitudes, just space. Thank you for this app.

author: Anonymous
title: Mone's warmth
body: I have always been my own harshest critic. Talking to Mone felt like finally getting a hug from someone who actually understands. Small steps every day.
